--- Page 1 ---
Ref. No. VIPL/ MAF-0000D7519 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Date: 27-03-2026                 
 
To, 
Indian Oil Corporation Limited 
721606, MATERIALS PURCHASE DEPARTMENT,  
IOCL HALDIA REFINERY, HALDIA 
           
 
 
 
Subject: Manufacturer’s Authorization Form (MAF)  
 
 
Ref. Tender/Bid No: GEM/2026/B/7319588 Dated: 05-03-2026 
 
 
Dear Sir/(s), 
 
We M/s Voltriq India Pvt. Ltd. who are established and reputed Manufactures of “VOLTRIQ” We do hereby 
authorize M/s MBB ENTERPRISES LLP, F/F, F/S, BLOCK-A, PLOT NO. A-7/B-1, MILAP NAGAR, UTTAM 
NAGAR NEAR METRO STATION, New Delhi, Delhi, 110059 to Manufacture and quote the VOLTRIQ Products, 
for the above referred tender and sign the contract independently with you. 
Terms and conditions. 
 
 
The Reseller will quote and negotiate the product prices on GeM independent of any involvement of Voltriq 
India Pvt. Ltd., and all responsibility for the same shall be borne solely by such Reseller. 
 
In case of any dilution / localization of such specifications by Reseller, the product warranty will be 
terminated. 
 
This Manufacturer Authorization Form is only valid for the above-specified bid. 
 
The authorization is issued and valid for a limited time-period. 
 
 
 
Thanks & Regards  
 
For, and on behalf of Voltriq India Pvt. Ltd. 
 
 
 
 
 
Vikash Kr. Singh 
 
Vertical Head Govt. & Retail sales 
 
vikash@voltriq.in 
 
+91- 926000 8000 
 
Note: Regarding any clarifications pertaining to this Authorization Letter, or to check the validity thereof, an e-mail        
may be sent to Voltriq India Pvt. Ltd. at vikash@voltriq.in

IN VOLTRIQ

--- Page 3 ---
Introduction
Voltriq India Pvt Ltd. is a new beginning of a company
that was founded in 2018 with the aim to create an
Indian Leading Manufacturing and Marketing of
Consumer Durable & IT Products. We keep on
improving and always strive to design a unique
product for our users. We are dedicated to utilize the
money invested by our customers in creating,
designing, and gathering the best products and
companies in the market.

--- Page 4 ---
We started with a vision and a
passion: to make the best
technology available to everyone
in India. That was in 2018 in an
Electronics retail store in Delhi.
Today, Voltriq India Pvt Ltd is a
leading make-in-India company
that is transforming the digital
landscape of India.
Our Purpose
We offer a range of products
and services, from home
appliances to high-
performance computing, that
enhance the lives of people with
extraordinary capabilities. We
also care about social impact
and sustainability, and we strive
to make a positive difference in
everything we do.

--- Page 5 ---
Who Are We?
Some like-minded guys assembled and decide to make the lives of people
beautiful and easy by choosing to make their hands dirty! These people are
called: VOLTRIQues
They got this idea from the initiative in Indore of “Neki-Diwaar.”
If people can contribute to society by providing them with clothes, then
there should be something that should provide them with their day-to-day
necessities just with a click!
Our pool of products includes Kitchen Appliances, Heater and Blower, and
Water Solutions.
Not only this, we also provide LFD and LED TV, Coffee Machines, Voltage
Stabilizers, Desktop computers, and Air Coolers.
By taping with the talent of young creators, Voltriq has got into the market
in very short span of time. With a presence in all over India.
